---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}

corn <- read.csv("RMACountyYieldsReport-115.csv")

corn <- corn |>
  rename(
    commodity_code    = Commodity.Code,
    commodity_name    = Commodity.Name,
    state_code        = State.Code,
    state_name        = State.Name,
    state_abbr        = State.Abbreviation,
    county_code       = County.Code,
    county_name       = County.Name,
    irr_code          = Irrigation.Practice.Code,
    irr_practice      = Irrigation.Practice.Name,
    year              = Yield.Year,
    yield             = Yield.Amount
)
```

```{r}
corn_states <- corn |>
  filter(trimws(state_abbr) %in% c(
    "ND", "SD", "NE", "KS", "MN", "IA", "MO",
    "AR", "LA", "MS", "AL", "WI", "IL", "MI",
    "IN", "OH", "KY", "TN"
  )) |>
  mutate(
    state_abbr = trimws(state_abbr),
    FIPS = sprintf("%02d%03d", state_code, county_code)
  )
```

```{r}
library(tigris)

counties <- counties(state = c("ND", "SD", "NE", "KS", "MN", "IA", "MO",
    "AR", "LA", "MS", "AL", "WI", "IL", "MI", "IN", "OH", "KY", "TN"), 
    cb=TRUE)

corn_map <- counties |>
  inner_join(corn_states, by = c("GEOID" = "FIPS")) |>
  st_transform(4326)
```
```{r}
library(h3jsr)
# Fill each county polygon with H3 cells at resolution 4
h3_list <- polygon_to_cells(corn_map, res = 5, simple = TRUE)

# Expand list to data frame, join county attributes by row index
h3_df <- tibble(
  h3_address = unlist(h3_list),
  row_idx    = rep(seq_along(h3_list), lengths(h3_list))
) |>
  left_join(
    corn_map |> st_drop_geometry() |> mutate(row_idx = row_number()),
    by = "row_idx"
  ) |>
  # Average yield where H3 cells span multiple counties
  group_by(h3_address, year) |>
  summarise(yield = mean(yield, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  filter(!is.na(h3_address))
```


```{r}
# convert to resolution=4
h3_df <- h3_df |>
  mutate(h3_address = get_parent(h3_address, res = 4)) |>
  group_by(h3_address, year) |>
  summarise(yield = mean(yield, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

write.csv(h3_df, "rma_h3.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Convert H3 addresses back to sf polygons
h3_sf <- cell_to_polygon(h3_df$h3_address, simple = FALSE) |>
  bind_cols(h3_df |> select(year, yield))
```

```{r}
pal <- colorNumeric(
  palette = "YlOrRd",
  domain  = h3_sf$yield,
  na.color = "#d0d0d0"
)

h3_sf |>
filter(year == 2024) |>
leaflet() |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
  addPolygons(
    fillColor  = ~pal(yield),
    fillOpacity = 0.85,
    color      = NA,
    label      = ~paste0(round(yield, 1), "%"),
    labelOptions = labelOptions(textsize = "11px")
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    pal      = pal,
    values   = ~yield,
    title    = "Corn Acres (%)<br><small>Percent of County Area<br>2024 RMA</small><br>
    <small>Resolution = 4",
    opacity  = 1
  )

```

Missing values in map
